azure_blob_storage_endpoint_domain_name.description: This is Azure Blob Storage endpoint domain name. Leave default value (or leave it empty if run container from command line) to use Microsoft native from example.
azure_blob_storage_endpoint_domain_name.title: Azure Blob Storage Endpoint Domain Name

azure_blob_storage_account_name.description: The name of the Azure Blob Storage Account. Read more here.
azure_blob_storage_account_name.title: Azure Blob Storage Account Name

azure_blob_storage_container_name.description: The name of the Azure Blob Storage Container. Read more here.
azure_blob_storage_container_name.title: Azure Blob Storage Container Name

shared_access_signature.description: A shared access signature (SAS) provides secure delegated access to resources in your storage account. Read more here. If you set this value, you must not set the "Azure Blob Storage Account Key", "Azure Tenant ID", "Azure Client ID", or "Azure Client Secret" fields.
shared_access_signature.title: Shared Access Signature

azure_blob_storage_account_key.description: The Azure Blob Storage account key. If you set this value, you must not set the "Shared Access Signature", "Azure Tenant ID", "Azure Client ID", or "Azure Client Secret" fields.
azure_blob_storage_account_key.title: Azure Blob Storage Account Key

azure_tenant_id.description: The Azure Active Directory (Entra ID) tenant ID. Required for Entra ID authentication.
azure_tenant_id.title: Azure Tenant ID

azure_client_id.description: The Azure Active Directory (Entra ID) client ID. Required for Entra ID authentication.
azure_client_id.title: Azure Client ID

azure_client_secret.description: The Azure Active Directory (Entra ID) client secret. Required for Entra ID authentication.
azure_client_secret.title: Azure Client Secret

azure_blob_storage_spill_size.description: The amount of megabytes after which the connector should spill the records in a new blob object. Make sure to configure size greater than individual records. Enter 0 if not applicable.
azure_blob_storage_spill_size.title: Azure Blob Storage Target Blob Size (MB)

compression_codec.description: The compression algorithm used to compress data pages.
compression_codec.title: Compression Codec

block_size_mb.description: This is the size of a row group being buffered in memory. It limits the memory usage when writing. Larger values will improve the IO when reading, but consume more memory when writing. Default: 128 MB.
block_size_mb.title: Block Size (Row Group Size) (MB)

max_padding_size_mb.description: Maximum size allowed as padding to align row groups. This is also the minimum size of a row group. Default: 8 MB.
max_padding_size_mb.title: Max Padding Size (MB)

page_size_kb.description: The page size is for compression. A block is composed of pages. A page is the smallest unit that must be read fully to access a single record. If this value is too small, the compression will deteriorate. Default: 1024 KB.
page_size_kb.title: Page Size (KB)

dictionary_page_size_kb.description: There is one dictionary page per column per row group when dictionary encoding is used. The dictionary page size works like the page size but for dictionary. Default: 1024 KB.
dictionary_page_size_kb.title: Dictionary Page Size (KB)
